<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 1625; 725; 2850; 9400; 20000
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 1600; 750; 1800; 6250; 12000
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 3; ; 0
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Quickscope; Survivalist's Kit; Sharp Shooter; Hunter In The Night
$FNC-PVP-UPGRADE$ = Faster Hands; Experienced; Better Gear; Deadliest Hunter
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 3839040358; 3839041547; 3839042767; 3839043838
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 45 || 3.45 || 22 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 45 || 2.45 || 22 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 96 || 2.45 || 24 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 156 || 2.1 || 26 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 225 || 1.8 || 27.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 20 || 1.7 || 18 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 20 || 1.2 || 21 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 35 || 1.2 || 21 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 85 || 1.2 || 21 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 165 || 1.2 || 24 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
